data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and docs with portability mechanisms
data.description:
## Description

Update existing project documentation to reflect the new environment portability features added by sibling stories (shim sentinel self-detection, command wrappers, portability lint).

### Files to update:

1. **CLAUDE.md** — Update the DSO_ROOT resolution order comment/docs to include the new step 3 (sentinel self-detection via plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json). Add the CLAUDE.md directive for agent fallback to plugins/dso/agents/ when named sub-agents are unavailable (SC8 from the epic).

2. **CLAUDE.md** — Document the .claude/commands/ wrapper mechanism: how wrappers detect marketplace plugin installation via claude plugin list, and the fallback to local plugins/dso/skills/ files.

3. **CLAUDE.md** — Document check-portability.sh and the # portability-ok inline suppression.

4. **plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md** — Replace hardcoded /Users/joeoakhart paths in examples with generic placeholders or add # portability-ok suppression (coordinate with story 42b6-5803 which may have already annotated some).

### Style guide
Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions.

### TDD Exemption
Unit test exempt. Justification: (1) No conditional logic — pure documentation updates to .md files, (2) any test would be a change-detector test grepping for text, (3) static assets only — markdown documentation has no executable behavior.

### File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify)
- plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md (modify — if not already handled by 42b6-5803)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents the shim sentinel self-detection fallback
  Verify: grep -q 'sentinel\|self-detect\|plugin.json' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents the agent fallback directive for plugins/dso/agents/
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/agents/' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents the .claude/commands/ wrapper mechanism
  Verify: grep -q '.claude/commands/' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents check-portability.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'check-portability.sh\|portability-ok' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] No unexempted hardcoded /Users/ paths in updated docs
  Verify: grep '/Users/' CLAUDE.md plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'portability-ok' | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
